'''âr-f-d-w''' ('''karafdewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:axel|axel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:axel|axel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| karafdewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirafdewoko|thirafdewoko]] || [[word:jirafdewoko|jirafdewoko]] || [[word:shirafdewoko|shirafdewoko]] || [[word:kirafdewoko|kirafdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurafdewoko|thuthurafdewoko]] || [[word:jujurafdewoko|jujurafdewoko]] || [[word:shushurafdewoko|shushurafdewoko]] || [[word:kukurafdewoko|kukurafdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurafdewoko|thurafdewoko]] || [[word:jurafdewoko|jurafdewoko]] || [[word:shurafdewoko|shurafdewoko]] || [[word:kurafdewoko|kurafdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurafdewoko|thurafdewoko]] || [[word:jurafdewoko|jurafdewoko]] || [[word:shurafdewoko|shurafdewoko]] || [[word:kurafdewoko|kurafdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therafdewoko|therafdewoko]] || [[word:jerafdewoko|jerafdewoko]] || [[word:sherafdewoko|sherafdewoko]] || [[word:kerafdewoko|kerafdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorafdewoko|thothorafdewoko]] || [[word:jojorafdewoko|jojorafdewoko]] || [[word:shoshorafdewoko|shoshorafdewoko]] || [[word:kokorafdewoko|kokorafdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorafdewoko|thorafdewoko]] || [[word:jorafdewoko|jorafdewoko]] || [[word:shorafdewoko|shorafdewoko]] || [[word:korafdewoko|korafdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorafdewoko|thorafdewoko]] || [[word:jorafdewoko|jorafdewoko]] || [[word:shorafdewoko|shorafdewoko]] || [[word:korafdewoko|korafdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚrafdewoko|thĂŚrafdewoko]] || [[word:jĂŚrafdewoko|jĂŚrafdewoko]] || [[word:shĂŚrafdewoko|shĂŚrafdewoko]] || [[word:kĂŚrafdewoko|kĂŚrafdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharafdewoko|thatharafdewoko]] || [[word:jajarafdewoko|jajarafdewoko]] || [[word:shasharafdewoko|shasharafdewoko]] || [[word:kakarafdewoko|kakarafdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharafdewoko|tharafdewoko]] || [[word:jarafdewoko|jarafdewoko]] || [[word:sharafdewoko|sharafdewoko]] || [[word:karafdewoko|karafdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafdewoko|tharafdewoko]] || [[word:jarafdewoko|jarafdewoko]] || [[word:sharafdewoko|sharafdewoko]] || [[word:karafdewoko|karafdewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
